dataset_goal: Used to optimize multilingual meeting translation prompts while preserving structure.

how_to_use.prompt_optimization_target: Preserve speaker labels and timestamps, keep one line per input line, and translate commitments accurately.
how_to_use.few_shot_usage: Use one line-structured translation example and one mixed-language example as few-shot references.

cases.title: English to Chinese Structured Translation

transcript_segments.speaker: Alice
transcript_segments.text: I will send the revised deck by Friday.

transcript_segments.speaker: Bob
transcript_segments.text: Please also update the roadmap section before the client meeting.

reference_translation_style: [0.0] Alice: 我会在周五之前发送修订后的演示文稿。
[4.2] Bob: 也请在客户会议之前更新路线图部分。

cases.notes: Best few-shot example for structured line-preserving translation.

cases.title: Mixed Chinese-English Meeting to English

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker A
transcript_segments.text: We need to simplify the signup page.

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker B
transcript_segments.text: 我觉得第一步太复杂了，用户可能会放弃。

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker C
transcript_segments.text: Let's test two simpler versions this week.

reference_translation_style: [0.0] Speaker A: We need to simplify the signup page.
[3.2] Speaker B: I think the first step is too complicated, and users may give up.
[7.6] Speaker C: Let's test two simpler versions this week.

cases.notes: Best few-shot example for multilingual meetings.

cases.title: English to Japanese Status Update

transcript_segments.speaker: Lead
transcript_segments.text: Ken will confirm the vendor quote tomorrow.

transcript_segments.speaker: Ken
transcript_segments.text: Yes, I will send the update by noon.

reference_translation_style: [0.0] Lead: Ken will confirm the vendor quote tomorrow.
[3.0] Ken: はい、正午までに更新を送ります。

cases.notes: Useful for line mapping and commitment translation.

cases.title: Chinese Vendor Update to English

transcript_segments.speaker: 采购
transcript_segments.text: 供应商报价已经更新，但交付时间还没有确认。

transcript_segments.speaker: 项目经理
transcript_segments.text: 请你今天下午跟进供应商，并在明早会议前同步结果。

reference_translation_style: [0.0] 采购: The vendor quote has been updated, but the delivery timeline is not confirmed yet.
[4.1] 项目经理: Please follow up with the vendor this afternoon and share the result before tomorrow morning's meeting.

cases.notes: Held-out Chinese to English test case.
